# Data Source: okta_catalog_entry_default


Terraform Data Source for okta_catalog_entry_default.


## Links

- [Provider source](https://github.com/okta/terraform-provider-okta/blob/master/okta/services/governance/data_source_catalog_entry_default.go)

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "okta_catalog_entry_default" "test" {}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `entry_id` (String) The ID of the catalog entry.

### Read-Only

- `counts` (Block, Read-only) Entry count metadata. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--counts))
- `description` (String) Description of the catalog entry.
- `id` (String) Unique identifier for the entry.
- `label` (String) Label of the entry. Currently either Application or Resource Collection.
- `links` (Block, Read-only) Links available for a resource catalog entry. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--links))
- `name` (String) The name of the catalog entry.
- `parent` (String) Parent of the catalog entry.
- `requestable` (Boolean) Is the resource requestable.

<a id="nestedblock--counts"></a>
### Nested Schema for `counts`

Read-Only:

- `resource_counts` (Block, Read-only) Collection resource counts. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--counts--resource_counts))

<a id="nestedblock--counts--resource_counts"></a>
### Nested Schema for `counts.resource_counts`

Read-Only:

- `applications` (Number) Number of app resources in a collection.



<a id="nestedblock--links"></a>
### Nested Schema for `links`

Read-Only:

- `self` (Block, Read-only) A link to the catalog entry itself. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--links--self))

<a id="nestedblock--links--self"></a>
### Nested Schema for `links.self`

Read-Only:

- `href` (String) Contains the absolute API URL for retrieving this catalog entry resource.
